steps.title: Evaluate at the city border crossing
steps.content:
Since $x$ is hours after crossing the city border, $x = 0$ is the moment of crossing. Substituting into $f(x) = 60x + 12$:
$$f(0) = 60(0) + 12 = 12 \text{ km}$$
The train has traveled 12 km total by the moment it reaches the city border.

steps.title: Identify the source of the initial distance
steps.content:
The 12 km total distance at $x = 0$ must come from the segment between the station and the city border, since the train hasn't traveled any additional distance after crossing yet.

A is correct.
